name: styles/editorial
title: Editorial
description: Magazine field-guide art direction: warm paper, ink text, one oxblood accent, Fraunces display over Newsreader body, hairline rules, and an unhurried fade-and-settle motion signature.
useCases: essays, retrospectives, culture and strategy narratives
any deck that should feel written rather than pitched

motion.notes: Slow crossfades between slides; children settle in like paragraphs (760ms enters, 110ms stagger). Avoid bouncy or springy extras.

icons.guidance: Sparse, hairline sprite icons in ink or oxblood; prefer typographic markers (numbered kickers, asterisks) over icon grids.

attributes.name: data-ls-style
attributes.description: Activates the editorial art direction for the whole deck.

usage: Set data-ls-style="editorial" on the <html> element and load style.css plus the font.css of each font family dependency.
Use exactly one style per deck; styles replace the v1 theme presets.
